args:
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'schema.prisma'; then echo '
[foremanos-stack] WARNING: You are editing schema.prisma.
Remember to:
  1. Run `npx prisma generate` after changes
  2. Run `npx prisma db push` to sync to database
  3. Consider creating a migration plan for production
  4. Update any affected TypeScript types'; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'app/api/'; then if ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'getServerSession'; then echo '\n[foremanos-stack] REMINDER: API routes should include getServerSession(authOptions) for authentication.\nPublic routes (auth, webhooks, cron) are exempted at the middleware level but should have their own auth (CRON_SECRET, webhook signatures, etc.).'; fi; fi
